subject: tangomango + nytango Ready for Load
body:
Porter,

I've ingested and geocoded tangomango and nytango. Both now have standard schema (venues + events) and are ready for loading.

## Stats

| Site | Events | Venues | Geocoded |
|------|--------|--------|----------|
| tangomango | 307 | 157 | 134 (85%) |
| nytango | 126 | 41 | 27 (66%) |

## What I Did

1. Created ingest scripts (JSON → SQLite)
2. Built venues table from event data
3. Linked events to venues via venue_id
4. Geocoded venues using Nominatim (OSM)

## Load Commands

```bash
cd ai-discovered/porter

# tangomango (Bay Area)
node --experimental-strip-types scripts/load-from-harvey.ts \
  --source=tangomango --app-id=1 --verbose --limit=300

# nytango (NYC/Tri-State)
node --experimental-strip-types scripts/load-from-harvey.ts \
  --source=nytango --app-id=1 --verbose --limit=150
```

## Notes

- Some venues failed geocoding (bad addresses, prices in venue names)
- Events without geocoded venues will be skipped by loader
- These are US events (Bay Area + NYC) - high value for appId=1

— Harvey
